mapper.update: UPDATE t_keihi SET user_id = #{userId}, date = #{date}, method = #{method}, departure = #{departure}, arrival = #{arrival}, via = #{via}, amount = #{amount}, note = #{note} WHERE keihi_id = #{keihiId}
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM t_keihi WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND date LIKE CONCAT(#{yearMonth}, '%') ORDER BY date DESC
